artifacts.compiled_prompt: The vehicle anchors the composition with clear weight, ocean passing through foreground. Contrast defines every plane — light compressed against shadow with no mid-tone to soften the force; the environment holds tension like a coiled spring. The camera performs a slow orbital arc at waist height — moving around the subject as if examining it from every angle simultaneously, on a 24mm telephoto with medium depth of field preserving environmental context. Central compositional weight — the subject at the frame's exact center; everything radiates outward from that anchor. A diagonal tension pulls from upper-left to lower-right — the most natural eye path, here made conscious and deliberate. The frame holds contained force — energy waiting for release, compressed into perfect cinematic stillness before the inevitable explosion. Cinematic, hyperrealistic, no text overlays. Ultra-wide perspective (≤24mm), full environmental context. f/2.8. Building rhythm — gaining momentum through the shot.
